headings.usage: Page titles, widget titles, section headers. Gives an authoritative, structured feel. Avoid default SaaS look.

body.usage: Data grids, dense tables, forms, sidebar navigation. Extremely legible for dense numerical and text data.

mono.usage: Metrics, numerical data, availability percentages in tables.

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed left, hierarchical tree navigation, collapsible, width w-64, dark theme to contrast with light data area.
layout_and_spacing.main_content: Full height, responsive grid, dense spacing for data (p-4 to p-6 containers).
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Tables and cards use sharp 1px borders (border-border), no floating shadows, flat and structured.
layout_and_spacing.tables: High density. Sticky headers, sticky first column. Use small padding (px-3 py-2 or px-2 py-1) and text-sm for max data visibility.

features: Complex tables mapping instrumentation (Cuerda, Viento, Percusión, Coro, Teclados)

components_and_interactions.buttons: Square or rounded-md. Solid dark colors for primary actions, outline for secondary.
components_and_interactions.inputs: Shadcn based. Sharp borders, clear focus rings.

images.description: Elegant abstract concert hall interior, used as the hero background for the login split-screen.
Macro shot of a glowing cello string for luxury instrument feel.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all table text meets 4.5:1 ratio. Badges must use dark text (700/800) on light bg (50/100) for legibility.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, table rows, and sidebar links MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-season-config').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a split-screen Login page using the provided login_background image on one side, and a clean login form on the other.
Create a persistent Layout with a hierarchical Dark Sidebar (w-64) and a Light Main Content area.
In the Sidebar, implement a tree navigation with categories: Dashboard, Configuración de temporada, Seguimiento de convocatorias, Confirmación de plantillas, Asistencia y pagos, Informes.
For the 'Configuración de temporada' page, use a series of Shadcn Accordions containing tables to define instrumentation needs (Cuerdas, Vientos, etc.).

For the 'Seguimiento de convocatorias' page, build a highly dense DataGrid. Ensure it scrolls horizontally if needed, with a sticky left column for the musician's name. Apply the exact color-coding rules to availability percentages (0-30% Red, 31-60% Orange, 61-80% Yellow, 81-100% Green). Add a right-side panel (drawer/sidebar) for sending communications.
Inject the 'Cabinet Grotesk' font for Headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for the body text in the global CSS.
